## node package

<tbody><tr><td>

[childProcessToPostMessage(childProcess)](./node.childprocesstopostmessage.md)


</td><td>

Creates a PostMessageEndpoint from a Node.js Child Process with IPC enabled.

This adapter converts a Node.js child process into a PostMessage-compatible interface, enabling use with remobj's PostMessage-based APIs. Requires the child process to be created with IPC enabled (fork() or spawn with stdio: 'ipc').


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[nodeStreamsToStreamEndpoint(readable, writable)](./node.nodestreamstostreamendpoint.md)


</td><td>

Converts Node.js readable/writable streams to a StreamEndpoint.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[socketToPostMessage(socket)](./node.sockettopostmessage.md)


</td><td>

Creates a PostMessageEndpoint from a Node.js Socket using line-delimited JSON.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[workerThreadToPostMessage(worker)](./node.workerthreadtopostmessage.md)


</td><td>

Creates a PostMessageEndpoint from a Node.js Worker Thread.


</td></tr>
